_comment_ollama: Local-Ollama path is OPTIONAL. Leave ollama_url empty + ollama_model set to a cloud model (e.g. MiniMax-M2.7) for cloud-only deployments (mac mini, server without GPU). Only fill ollama_url/ssh_tunnel_host if you actually have a local Ollama or a DGX you tunnel to.
_comment_shape_routing: P3: route by inferred shape category (pattern_cache.infer_category). Based on trials=3 benchmark — MiniMax wins 5/12 shapes outright, ties 7, loses 0. Only bottle routes to DeepSeek (DeepSeek 100% pass-rate vs MiniMax 67%).
_comment_feature_flags: Sprint 5-7 feature flags. Each = single point of rollback. Safe-to-enable group is on by default. sandbox_strict is now an *enforce* hard-gate at execute_code (RestrictedPython compile_strict; promoted from shadow after 16/16 compile_ok). best_of_n remains in shadow-mode (extra-candidate logging only — does not alter user-facing response) pending more cost-vs-score data.
_comment_slicer_path: Optional. PrusaSlicer console binary path for the slicer_check flag. Leave empty if slicer_check is OFF (default). On macOS it's typically /Applications/PrusaSlicer.app/Contents/MacOS/PrusaSlicer; on Windows portable, e.g. C:\Tools\PrusaSlicer\PrusaSlicer-2.9.4\prusa-slicer-console.exe.
